title: U.S.-China Comprehensive Economic Dialogue
summary: This page is a navigation/listing page on home.treasury.gov that provides links to archived U.S.-China dialogue documents from 2007 to 2016, including Strategic and Economic Dialogue (S&ED) and Comprehensive Economic Dialogue (CED) framework references. The page contains no substantive policy content—just an index of Treasury Secretary remarks and joint fact sheets. Most recent content dates to mid-2016, making this page irrelevant as a macro catalyst source for current market analysis.
key_points: Page is a navigation/listing page containing archived documents, not primary research or current analysis
Most recent content is dated June-July 2016, nearly 10 years prior to the review date
CED was established in April 2017 but the page contains no content from that framework
Content consists of historical Treasury Secretary remarks and joint fact sheets from bilateral dialogues
Domain is high-trust (treasury.gov) but content is too stale to serve as a macro catalyst source
No substantive policy decisions, data releases, or market-moving information present
why_it_matters: This source provides no current analytical value. As a listing page with 2016-era historical document links, it cannot serve as a macro catalyst source or support RAG retrieval for market-relevant intelligence. The actual substantive documents (remarks, fact sheets) referenced here should be archived individually if they have historical value.
